kernel: platform -> company -> business -> carrier -> fact -> projection
purpose: Make the cross-industry business abstraction machine-checkable before adding or changing backend models.

concepts.name: Platform
concepts.definition: Product/runtime layer that manages tenants, company access, capabilities, policies, integrations, scenes, subscriptions, entitlements, usage, operations, and audit.
concepts.platform_contract: Owns governance, extension contracts, and the cross-industry business scope vocabulary; must not embed one industry carrier as mandatory platform truth.
concepts.current_construction_binding: smart_core owns subscription, entitlement, usage, ops jobs, and sc.business.scope.mixin; smart_construction_core binds capability, scene, pack, approval, audit, and native integration models

concepts.name: Company
concepts.definition: Managed organization that owns users, permission boundary, accounting boundary, operating responsibility, and business.
concepts.platform_contract: Every business, carrier, fact, policy, projection, and capability must be company-aware directly or through a carrier.
concepts.current_construction_binding: res.company plus sc.business.entity and company-related governance models

concepts.name: Business
concepts.definition: Company-managed economic activity or operating matter that can create income, expense, bilateral, governance, or neutral facts.
concepts.platform_contract: Can exist before an industry carrier is created; can use one or more carriers; must not assume project as universal.
concepts.current_construction_binding: Represented by sc.business.scope.mixin metadata and implicitly through tender, contract, project, finance, treasury, and operational documents

concepts.name: Business Direction
concepts.definition: Economic or management direction of business such as income, expense, bilateral/mixed, governance, or neutral.
concepts.platform_contract: Provides cross-industry classification for facts and projections without imposing industry vocabulary.
concepts.current_construction_binding: income contracts, expense contracts, receipts, payments, cost, treasury, governance, and projections

concepts.name: Carrier
concepts.definition: Industry-defined object that carries execution, permissions, documents, tasks, facts, and visibility for business.
concepts.platform_contract: Carrier type is industry-defined; platform only requires optional carrier identity, company/business ownership, lifecycle, and fact scope.
concepts.current_construction_binding: sc.business.scope.mixin provides optional carrier metadata; project.project remains construction carrier type project

concepts.name: Fact
concepts.definition: Dated, attributable occurrence or state change inside company-managed business.
concepts.platform_contract: Must declare company/business/carrier scope where applicable, direction, source/provenance, lifecycle/write policy, and projection impact.
concepts.current_construction_binding: construction formal facts such as contract, payment, receipt, invoice, tax, treasury, material, labor, equipment, subcontract, progress, quality, safety, risk, and diary

concepts.name: Projection
concepts.definition: Derived management visibility over facts, carriers, and company/business state.
concepts.platform_contract: Must declare source models, implementation mode, refresh owner, idempotency key, write policy, and acceptance probe.

concepts.name: Policy
concepts.definition: Reusable governance rule for capability, approval, validation, visibility, installation, audit, and lifecycle.
concepts.platform_contract: Controls company/business/fact behavior without owning the business fact itself.
concepts.current_construction_binding: approval policy, workflow, dictionary, audit, validation, scene, capability, pack, and subscription models

carrier_bindings.business_binding: Main construction execution carrier for income, expense, cost, progress, quality, safety, treasury, material, labor, equipment, and subcontract facts.
carrier_bindings.platform_boundary: Do not promote project-specific requirements to platform kernel; expose project through carrier contract.
